description: PAGE FOUR The East Hartford Gazette Etablihed In 1884 by Henry B Hale Published every Thursday at 1128 Main Street East Hartford Connecticut Entered as second class matter at the Post Office in Hartford on December 2 1942 under the Act Of March 3 1879 All news contributions and releases exchanges and business communi cations should be addressed to the East Hartford Gazette 1128 Main Street East Hartford Connecticut Telephone JAckson 82194 Subscrip tion rate 300 per year servicemen and teachers 200 per year John W Mclean Editor John G Rohrbach General Manager Published by the West Hartford Publishing Company Bice Clemow President Henry E Griffith Vice President Thursday November 1 1956 Gazette Endorses Candidates For Office The time has come when the Gazette endorses candidates In the races in which we are making endorsements we have jeard both candidates speak and gave talked with them personal ly We know from the empty teats at rallies held by both par ties that most East Hartford voters have not had this oppor tunity For Congress These are the Gazettes choices The Gazette endorses Edwin H May We consider Mr May to have some shortcomings We believe that he has much to
